future_status_protocol: If San Antonio SSC publishes a machine-readable online rainout status for each venue, enable polling only after parser tests. The current official alerts page publishes the rainout line phone number and directs users to alerts/app options.
agent_rule: Official source wins. The official alerts page publishes rainout line 210-774-4630, but this registry entry does not yet parse a live online status. Keep official status unknown and tell the user to call 210-774-4630 or check the official alerts source before leaving.
